chapter_title.en: Chapter on Categories Upon Whom Zakat is Obligatory

text: 1620 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ دُرُسْتَ بْنِ أَبِي مَنْصُورٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي اَلزَّكَاةِ يَبْعَثُ بِهَا اَلرَّجُلُ إِلَى بَلَدٍ غَيْرِ بَلَدِهِ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ يَبْعَثُ بِالثُّلُثِ أَوِ اَلرُّبُعِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1620 - In a narration from Durust ibn Abi Mansur, it is reported that Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said regarding Zakat:
"A man may send a portion of his Zakat to a place other than his own. He said, 'There is no issue if he sends one-third or one-fourth of it.'"
